date_notes: Interview published May 26 2026; Sylvestre to declare next steps early June 2026.
title_en: Separatist leader organizes potential UCP leadership review over premier's pro-remain referendum stance
title_fr: Un chef séparatiste organise un possible examen de la direction de l'UCP en raison de la position pro-maintien de la première ministre
description_en: Mitch Sylvestre, of the Alberta Prosperity Project and Stay Free Alberta, organizes to force either a UCP leadership review of the premier or a change to the referendum question. The October 19 2026 referendum offers two options: remain a Canadian province, or begin a legal process toward a binding secession vote. The premier is publicly pro-remain; the UCP party has declared neutrality.

actors.display_role: Stay Free Alberta / Alberta Prosperity Project
actors.name: Mitch Sylvestre

relations.note: Intra-party pressure following premier's federalist turn.

verification_notes: Update when Sylvestre declares next steps June 2026.

claim_contested_by.counter_claim: UCP president Rob Smith states grassroots members back the premier's compromise question.
